zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Alexander Way於1530年出生在英國多瑟特阿林頓時，他的父親Henry Way30歲，母親Agnes Symes20歲。他於1547年與Mary Joanna Gallop在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿林頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1589年3月9日在英國多瑟特布利波特享年59歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特阿林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Alexander Way于1530年出生在英国多瑟特阿林頓时，他的父亲Henry Way30岁，母亲Agnes Symes20岁。他于1547年与Mary Joanna Gallop在英国英格兰多瑟特阿林頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1589年3月9日在英国多瑟特布利波特享年59岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特阿林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Way
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southern): topographic name for someone who lived near a road or path, from Middle English wei (Old English weg, cognate with Old Norse vegr, Old High German weg), or a habitational name from some minor place called with this word, as for example any of the places called Way or Waye in Devon or Way in Somerset and Kent.

variants.name: Wei
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ming, Wei, Li, Chao, Hong, Cheng, Jin, Ling, Ping, Yuan, Bin, Dong, Lan, Min, Chang, Chong, Chung, Houa, Pai, Sha, Yiming.

Mandarin form of the surname 魏, a term referring to ‘the buildings at either side of the gates of the royal palace’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Wei (魏), originally the name of a fief (located in Ruicheng in Shanxi province) granted to Bi Wan, an official in the state of Jin. In 403  BC , the state of Jin was split into three, one of which was the state of Wei (魏), established by Wei Huan Zi (魏桓子). After this state was annexed by the state of Qin in 225  BC , its name was adopted by some people as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Mi (羋) by Wei Ran (魏冉), an official who lived in the state of Qin during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ). (iii) borne by descendants of Wei Liao Weng (魏了翁), a scholar during the Southern Song dynasty (1127–1279  AD ), who changed his original name Gao (高) to his uncle's surname Wei (魏).

variants.name: Wey
meanings: English (Dorset and Somerset): variant of   Way  .
Dutch: variant, mostly archaic or Americanized, of Weij, a topographic name from weide ‘pasture, meadow’ (compare Vanderweide ).
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names based on the element wīg ‘battle’ (compare Weyers ). This surname is also found in Belgium.

variants.name: Waye
meanings: English (Devon and Kent): variant of   Way  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Alexander Way was born in 1530, in Allington, Dorset, England, his father, Henry Way, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Symes, was 20. He married Mary Joanna Gallop in 1547, in Allington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 March 1589, in Bridport, Dorset, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Allington, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Alexander Way est né en 1530, à Allington, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Henry Way, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Symes, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mary Joanna Gallop en 1547, à Allington, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 mars 1589, à Bridport, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Allington, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Alexander Way 1530 in Allington, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Way 30 und seine Mutter Agnes Symes 20. Er hat 1547 in Allington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Mary Joanna Gallop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. März 1589 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Bridport, Dorset, England und wurde in Allington, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Alexander Way è nato il nel 1530 nel Allington, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Henry Way, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Symes, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Mary Joanna Gallop nel 1547, nel Allington, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 marzo 1589, nel Bridport, Dorset, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Allington, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Alexander Wayが1530年にイギリスドールセトアリントンで生まれた時，父Henry Wayは30歳，母Agnes Symesは20歳であった。1547年にイギリスイギリスドールセトアリントンでMary Joanna Gallopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1589年3月9日にイギリスドールセトブリドプオルトで59歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトアリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Alexander Way(이)가 1530년 영국 도르세트 앨링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Way(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Symes(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1547년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 앨링턴에서 Mary Joanna Gallop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1589년 3월 9일 영국 도르세트 브리드포트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 앨링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Alexander Way nasceu em 1530, em Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Way, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Symes, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Joanna Gallop em 1547, em Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de março de 1589, em Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Alexander Way родился в 1530 г. в местности аллингтон, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Way было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Symes, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Joanna Gallop в 1547 г. в местности аллингтон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 марта 1589 г. в местности бридпорт, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности аллингтон, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Alexander Way nació en 1530, en Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Way, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes Symes, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Mary Joanna Gallop en 1547, en Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1589, en Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Allington, Dorset, Inglaterra.
